# Purpose
This code throws a `SyntaxError` with the message "error". It is a simple script that demonstrates how to explicitly raise a `SyntaxError` in JavaScript. The functionality is narrow, focusing solely on the generation of this specific error type. This can be useful for testing error handling mechanisms or for educational purposes to illustrate how `SyntaxError` is used in JavaScript.
